grace_state.staleness_label: admin_policy_bundle on 'offline_grace' remains within its declared grace window; local-safe continuity remains available while new privileged operations wait for fresh verification.

degraded_mode_consequences: Fresh managed privilege is denied while last-known-good continuity remains visible.

Local-safe workflows remain available while managed privilege waits for refresh.

grace_state.staleness_label: trust_root_signer_update on 'offline_grace' is past grace; last-known-good local-safe continuity remains visible but trust-bearing actions are paused until signer review lands.
blocked_capability_consequences: new privileged imports denied until trust-root review completes
signer-rotated bundle apply denied until continuity is reviewed

degraded_mode_consequences: Fresh managed privilege is denied while last-known-good continuity remains visible.
Trust-bearing bundle apply pauses until signer continuity and root rotation review complete.
offline_or_stale_policy_notes: Trust-root review freshness expired; last-known-good continuity remains inspectable.
New privileged bundle apply is denied until trust-root rotation review lands.

rows.plain_language_summary: Row 'signed-policy-bundle-finalize:offline_grace:trust_root_signer_update' (offline_grace/trust_root_signer_update) qualifies stable: signed envelope is inspectable, stale posture is explicit, privileged posture is 'denied_pending_trust_root_repair', and lifecycle review remains portable.

lifecycle_events.note: Managed pull applied the current signed admin policy bundle after successful verification.
Fleet drop superseded the prior entitlement snapshot while preserving last-known-good lineage.
Expired trust-root pointer revoked the prior signer path and paused new privileged imports until review.
Mirror-distributed signer rotation remained reviewable with old/new lineage and continuity evidence.
Emergency-disable bundle activated the minimum-version ratchet and paused the affected managed actions without stranding local work.

rows.outcome_label: Signed policy bundle verified against the live trust anchor.
rows.explanation_label: Live verify against the vendor-managed root admits managed authority cleanly.

rows.outcome_label: Entitlement snapshot verified live; seat active.
rows.explanation_label: Live verify against the vendor-managed root admits the entitlement snapshot.

rows.outcome_label: Signed mirror policy bundle verified against the mirror root.
rows.explanation_label: Mirror verify against the signed-mirror root preserves the upstream chain.

rows.outcome_label: Entitlement snapshot verified against the signed mirror.
rows.explanation_label: Mirror entitlement verify keeps the seat active without live vendor calls.

rows.outcome_label: Air-gapped policy bundle verified against the offline root.
rows.explanation_label: Air-gapped verify proves policy authority without leaving the offline boundary.

rows.outcome_label: Entitlement snapshot is past valid_until on the offline boundary.
rows.explanation_label: Expired offline entitlement narrows managed actions to inspect-only; local editing continues.

rows.display_label: Enterprise policy bundle, manual signed import
rows.outcome_label: Enterprise policy bundle verified against the manual-import root.
rows.explanation_label: Manual signed import keeps the enterprise managed policy authority intact.

rows.outcome_label: Enterprise entitlement snapshot arrived without a signature blob.
rows.explanation_label: Missing signature pauses managed entitlement actions until admin imports a signed file; local editing continues.

rows.display_label: Connected policy bundle from an untrusted signer
rows.outcome_label: Bundle signed by a signer not on the vendor-managed trust anchor list.
rows.explanation_label: Untrusted signer blocks managed authority pending admin quorum review; local editing continues.

rows.outcome_label: Unsigned local advisory bundle; no managed authority follows.
rows.explanation_label: Local advisory bundles are inspectable but never carry managed authority.
